title: Spilled
description: This mod allows you to mix potions into any food your heart desires!
body:
# This mod allows you to mix potions with any food item!

Simply place 1 or multiple potions and a food item in a crafting grid and you're good to go. 
![Mixing bread](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/54a2845c667c820ca4598dfd80a46d98686543e4.png)

Mix poison with golden apples to prank your friends or Mix turtle master with them to become a unstoppable :3
